title: Create: Basically Everything
description: A Create focused modpack (6.0) that also includes guns, planes, and various other vehicles.
body:
This is a **Create focused** modpack. Also includes gun**s**, vario**u**s vehi**c**les, both military and peaceful and a few world generation mods. Has a few social capabilities. This being Simple Voice Chat and Emojiful. Main mods: Create, several addons, Vic's Point Blan**k**, several **co**ntent packs for Point Blank, Immersive Air**c**raft, various vehicle mods and Artifacts. Very fun to play on a server with friends! **WARNING: A LOT OF KEYBINDS. WILL TAKE A LONG TIME TO CUSTOMIZE!**  

## Features:
-  **Guns** - From the 1900s to modern day!
- **Vehicles** -  Planes, cars and helicopters!
- **Voice chat** - Groups, whispering, proximity chat!
- **Countries** - Chunk claiming and party mods!


Unfortunately, this modpack does not have a wiki. It was designed for a server that me and my friends play on, and I plan to update mods monthly and as for patches, as soon as I can.

### TO SEE ALL CONTENT INCLUDED, GO  TO VERSIONS > VERSION YOU WISH TO CHECK CONTENT FOR > DEPENDENCIES (SCROLL DOWN)

**To report issues, join the discord server and go to the issues channel.**
